Language Python 
1.Given a complete binary tree represented as a list in a level-order (bfs) traversal, which level has the largest sum of all its odd-valued nodes? .
2.Imagine you're creating a secret number for a puzzle. The rule is to take a range of whole numbers, say from \(N\) to \(M\), and for every number in that range, you calculate the sum of its digits. The final secret number is the grand total of all those individual digit sums.So, if you're given two numbers, \(N\) and \(M\) (\(N\) will be less than or equal to \(M\)), your goal is to find the total sum of the digits for every single number from \(N\) all the way up to \(M\).
